testcase.name: test_create_toy_component
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_material_toys_api.py:130: in test_create_toy_component assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","tags"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":["test"],"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_toy_appears_in_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_material_toys_api.py:136: in test_toy_appears_in_list assert TestComponentsToysCategory.created_id E assert None E + where None = TestComponentsToysCategory.created_id
